title: Support Worker
description:
Are you looking for a rewarding role where you can make a difference every day?

We are seeking motivated Support Workers to join our team in Leeds. You will provide person-centred support to adults with learning disabilities, helping them to live independently and engage with their local community.

Key Responsibilities:
- Support with personal care and daily living tasks
- Encourage independence and choice
- Support access to social and community activities

Requirements:
- Good communication skills
- A caring and patient approach
- Ability to work flexible shifts including weekends

Full training will be provided.
summary: Support Worker role in Leeds supporting adults with learning disabilities.

title: Care Assistant
description:
We are currently recruiting Care Assistants in Leeds to support vulnerable individuals.

Duties include:
- Assisting with personal care
- Supporting daily routines
- Providing emotional support

You must have previous experience in care and a strong understanding of safeguarding.

Flexible shifts available.
summary: Care Assistant role in Leeds supporting vulnerable individuals.

title: Behaviour Support Worker
